Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.config

Class DiscoveryConfigReader

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.config.DiscoveryConfigReader
public class DiscoveryConfigReader extends Object

  • Constructor Details

    • DiscoveryConfigReader

      public DiscoveryConfigReader()

  • Method Details

    • read

      public DiscoveryConfig read(Node configNode) throws RepositoryException
      Reads config from a JCR node. All structural fields fall back to coded defaults if the JCR property is absent.
      Throws:
      RepositoryException

    • readWithDefaults

      public DiscoveryConfig readWithDefaults()
      Builds config using only env/sys credentials and coded defaults for structural fields. No JCR node required.

    • credentialsFromEnvSys

      public DiscoveryConfig credentialsFromEnvSys()
      Returns raw env/sys credential values; null for any field not found. No JCR, no coded defaults — structural fields are always null/0.

    • credentialsFromEnvSysOnly

      public DiscoveryCredentials credentialsFromEnvSysOnly()
